title: Explore All Fireplaces | Heat & Glo
description: Add warmth, comfort and ambiance with our lineup of gas, electric and wood fireplaces, inserts and log sets.

og.twitter:description: Add warmth, comfort and ambiance with our lineup of gas, electric and wood fireplaces, inserts and log sets.

h2: Browse our fireplace options and find the ideal fit for your home and life. Heat & Glo offers a full range of traditional and modern fireplace styles to bring family and friends together. From sleek and modern gas fireplaces to traditional cozy wood fireplaces — or even the easy-to-install electric fireplaces — simply filter by fuel type, style, and type of fireplace to find your future fireplace.

paragraphs: Browse our fireplace options and find the ideal fit for your home and life. Heat & Glo offers a full range of traditional and modern fireplace styles to bring family and friends together. From sleek and modern gas fireplaces to traditional cozy wood fireplaces — or even the easy-to-install electric fireplaces — simply filter by fuel type, style, and type of fireplace to find your future fireplace.

The Mezzo linear gas fireplace features one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by end-to-end ribbon flames. A wide range of sizes and styles help make Mezzo yours – including trendy fire bed materials and timeless log sets – and heat-management options so you can enjoy the beauty of this linear fireplace near your TV. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

The convenience of gas meets the experience of an open-hearth fireplace. Four hand-painted ceramic fiber logs fit inside your existing firebox and are equally beautiful with or without a burning fire. Simply use the included switch or remote for immediate, radiant heat that’s reminiscent of a real fire. Enjoy a bold, dynamic fire without the mess or hassle of wood.

Transform your home with our top-of-the-line Escape gas fireplace insert. The biggest, clearest view of the fire, hand-painted logs and efficient heating take your fireplace from unused to unbelievable. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

Enrich your open-hearth evenings with the outdoor Woodland Birch vented gas log set. Hand-painted birch logs offer the feel of a traditional fire by replacing real wood, giving you more efficient heat. The tubed burner system displays large flames and glowing embers. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths.

Bring home the look of a wood fire – without the hassle. The SupremeX gas insert features flames that wrap around hand-painted logs, creating a natural, cozy glow enhanced by an LED ember bed. Designed to maximize your fireplace opening, this insert offers a large and immersive fireside experience. And with design options to fit your aesthetic, it’ll feel like it was always part of your home. Available in 30-inch width.

Get all the ambiance of a mature, rustic fire with the convenience of gas logs. The Smoldering Timberland Oak vented gas log set includes hand-painted logs and a tube burner system designed to fit your existing firebox. Flames and true-to-life embers are ignited via match strike or control flame height with the touch of a button. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and single or double-tube burner.

Enjoy the beauty of a traditional, open hearth– without the hassle. The Timberland Oak vented gas log set includes hand-painted oak logs and a tube burner system designed to fit your existing firebox. Flames and true-to-life embers are ignited via match strike or control flame height with the touch of a button. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and single or double-tube burner.

With big flames and classic style, the Supreme gas fireplace insert gives your old, cold fireplace a beautiful makeover. Choose from the widest variety of logs and interior styles to get the look you love. Gathering around a roaring fire has never been easier thanks to this low-maintenance fireplace insert. Available in 25, 30 and 35-inch widths.

With the biggest viewing area in its class – up to 50” wide – the Rutherford open fireplace commands attention. Enjoy the crackle of a real wood fire thanks to the glass-free design and the look of a site-built masonry fireplace without the price tag. Gas log sets are also available to add to this fireplace, offering an alternative option to enjoy the boldness of an open flame with the convenience of gas. Note: not available in Canada.

Bring the warmth and wellbeing of fire to any room without the need for a hearth or mantel. The Supreme freestanding fireplace is installed in less than a day for a large, clear view of the fire that evening.

Convert your see-through fireplace to the ease of a gas log set. It looks great from either side and is attractive even when not burning. Switch on bold flames through charred logs and glowing embers for true enjoyment.

Big interiors need a big fireplace. The True gas fireplace sets the standard in a traditional masonry style. Warm up the good times with the largest view in its class and serious heat. Truly extraordinary.

This outdoor gas log set looks so real, friends will ask to grab more kindling for the fire. Replace hassle for rust-resistant, hand-painted smoldering oak logs and a tubed burner system that displays large flames and glowing embers. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths.

Bring warmth, light and intention to your outdoor space with the Lanai double-sided outdoor gas fireplace. A ribbon of flames dances across vibrant crushed glass, creating an atmosphere that feels equal parts refined and inviting. Crafted from rust-resistant stainless steel, the Lanai is built to perform beautifully in the elements, season after season. Choose from 48" or 60" widths, with this double-sided configuration that adapts seamlessly to patios, terraces and open-air living spaces.

Enjoy the beauty of an open-hearth fire, without the hassle. The Grand Birch vented gas log set includes hand-painted oak logs and a tiered burner system that displays large flames and glowing embers on multiple levels, all controlled with easy on/off capabilities thanks to electronic ignition. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and two or three-tiered burners.

With fuel-saving efficiency and the effortless operation of Smart Burn Technology, the Pioneer III wood-burning fireplace supplies serious heat in a beautiful fire. Add up to two heat zone ducts to send warmth into other rooms.

The Triton electric fireplace is a showstopper with its impressive 20" tall glass and modern, built-in design. Available in 50", 65" and 78" lengths and three configurations, (one-sided, two-sided corner, three-sided bay) it adapts to any space and style. You can even link multiple units together for unlimited length, extra warmth and bold, continuous flames across a striking feature wall.

Enjoy the fire yearlong, from either side. Venting in the Twilight see-through indoor/outdoor fireplace gives you freedom in designing two spaces, including windows above the fire to expand fireside views.

Make your home your castle. From patio to living room, savor the same beautiful fire with the Fortress see-through gas fireplace. It is built of stainless steel and sealed to blend outdoor and indoor relaxation.

For a sleek fit with distinctive style, the SlimLine Fusion modern gas fireplace gives you endless options. Create your look with a blend of 10 modern and traditional elements to fill your space with a glow.

Make a statement in your outdoor oasis as you enjoy the experience of a large, open hearth outdoor fireplace. The Castlewood, one of our most impressive wood-burning fireplaces, combines a stunning 38-inch-tall firebox – with no glass to enhance the views and warmth – and safety-ensured brick construction.

Enjoy a sophisticated fire at a smaller footprint, thanks to the sleek design of the Cosmo gas linear fireplace. Personalize the look with a range of fronts, log sets and interior options. Heat management makes it safe to install your TV above the fireplace, with just mere inches in between. Available in 32, 36 and 42-inch widths.

The best-selling 6K/8K gas fireplace pairs powerful performance with refined design that brings a striking focal point to your space. Getting the right look is simple: choose from three Design Packages – Modern Farmhouse, Organic Modern, or New Traditional – each offering a curated set of fireplace front, interior panels and logs designed to match your home style. And with thoughtful features like voice control and adjustable heat management, it’s easy to set the mood and enjoy the fire your way, year‑round.

Gather with family and friends around the crackle and aroma of a blazing fire, as you take the chill off evenings and extend the outdoor season. The Cottagewood outdoor fireplace offers an open-hearth experience, enriching your connection to the fire itself and the people around it.

The Heritage Oak log set was designed with the outdoor elements in mind. Lose the hassle of a wood fire and enjoy low-maintenance, outdoor evenings with easy electronic ignition and control of rust-resistant, hand-painted logs. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and two or three-tiered burners.

Warm up your whole home safely and efficiently with the Pioneer II. This wood-burning fireplace is EPA-approved, offering a cleaner burn that’s better for you and the environment. Bold flames last up to eight hours from just one load of wood and are encased by your choice of either a rectangular or arch fireplace front.
The first indoor/outdoor gas fireplace trends ahead with the Twilight Modern see-through model. Artistic flames rise through crushed glass with no chimney or venting needed in a contemporary design.

The convenience of gas meets the experience of an open-hearth fireplace. Eight hand-painted, ceramic fiber logs are designed to be ultra-realistic – beautiful with or without a burning fire. Simply use the included switch or remote for immediate, radiant heat that’s reminiscent of a real fire. Enjoy a bold, dynamic fire without the mess or hassle of wood. Logs available in 24 or 30-inch widths.
Unify your space even if you do not have much space—or budget. The 36" see-through gas fireplace delivers Heat & Glo quality in a myriad of styles to create a unique and inviting presence.

Shape your atmosphere with our best combination of beauty and warmth. The smooth curves of the Cerona indoor gas fireplace give it a bigger presence. And, our patented FireBrick® supplies 25-percent more heat.

Match your modern design style with the Cosmo gas insert. It fits directly inside your outdated, wood-burning firebox, turning an unusable fireplace into an efficient, easy-to-use gas fire. No more hassle, only pure fireplace enjoyment. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

Restore the beauty and functionality of your fireplace with the Provident. This gas fireplace insert helps heat your home efficiently and provides a natural gathering space, all with the touch of a button. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

The Format is the best electric fireplace for sleek, minimal style that requires zero hassle to hang. With its floating mantel, this white electric fireplace provides glow from LED flames, as well as moody mantel downlighting. Enjoy it year-round with or without heat. Available in 43-inch, 50-inch, and 60-inch fireplace widths.

Add the atmosphere of fire into your room in a new way. The Corner Two-Sided gas fireplace brings an unused space to life, either left- or right-facing. It is a novel way to visual punch to tighter spaces.

Think big, deliver bigger in a fireside experience you can walk around. The Pier three-sided gas fireplace partitions your space or anchors multiple rooms in authentic or modern styling with fire from three views.

Think outside the box, inside your space. The Mezzo Double-Sided fireplace provides one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by dynamic, end-to-end ribbon flames. Choose from seven fire bed materials and two log sets to create a stunning interior room divider. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

In a clean transitional look, draw people and your interior together. The Escape See-Through fireplace stands out with its huge opening and bold flames, adding architectural interest to multiple rooms.

Enliven your patio evenings with this outdoor vented gas log set. Replace hassle for rust-resistant, hand-painted smoldering oak logs and a tubed burner system that displays large flames and glowing embers. Enjoy the feel of an open-hearth fire. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths.

Live large with the Royal Hearth indoor wood fireplace at our most affordable price. Every time you light up a fire, you will appreciate the clean look, minimal exposed metal, easy damper, mess-saving ash lip, and invisible smoke shield.

The Scion is a linear electric fireplace with a sophisticated design, including a modern, minimal front trim, no visible heater, and a built-in look with 16" tall glass for a stunning view. Your choice of crystal media or driftwood logs complements vibrant LED flames and customizable ember bed colors, creating a captivating ambiance that’s tailored to your interior design style. Available in 43 and 55-inch widths.

Your fireplace gets a touch of finesse with the Contemporary Gas Logs Series. The slim burner is designed for existing fireboxes so you can easily upgrade your wood-burning fire to a more efficient, contemporary solution. A combination of reflective glass and your choice of gas logs, lava rock or cannon ball set provides a modern backdrop for the liveliness of warm, glowing flames.

Adding the traditional look of a fireplace to your home has never been easier thanks to the Built-in electric fireplace from SimpliFire. A masonry-style interior, textured log set, and flame height adjustments give you all the ambiance of a real fire with the convenience of pressing a button. Available in 30-inch and 36-inch fireplace widths.

The SimpliFire Forum outdoor electric fireplace expands your livable space. Designed to withstand long sun-exposure and weather the elements, the Forum frees up your outdoor area of propane tanks, gas lines and wood. Enjoy the flexibility and ambiance of placing this heat-free fire feature on any deck or patio. Available in 43-inch and 55-inch fireplace widths.

The Timberland Oak log set was designed with the outdoor elements in mind. Lose the hassle of a wood fire and enjoy low-maintenance, outdoor evenings with easy electronic ignition and control of rust-resistant, hand-painted logs. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths.
Make the most of your space with the most fireplace for a slender 16” profile. The popular SlimLine gas fireplace is ideal for nestling into tight spots and adding extra comfort to your couch time.

Enjoy the beauty of an open-hearth fire, without the hassle. The Heritage Oak vented gas log set includes hand-painted oak logs and a tiered burner system that displays large flames and glowing embers on multiple levels, all controlled with easy on/off capabilities thanks to electronic ignition. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and two or three-tiered burners.

Enjoy the beauty of a birch wood fire with gas logs that make your fireplace hassle-free. The Woodland Birch vented gas log set includes hand-painted logs and a tube burner system designed to fit your existing firebox. Flames and true-to-life embers are ignited via match strike or control flame height with the touch of a button. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and single or double-tube burner.

The Duzy 3 brings the convenience of gas to an existing open-hearth fireplace. Six hand-painted refractory logs are incredibly realistic – beautiful with or without a burning fire. Simply use the included switch or remote for immediate, radiant heat that’s reminiscent of a real fire. Enjoy a bold, dynamic fire without the mess or hassle of wood.

Create a space that brings family and friends together with the Outdoor Lifestyles® Courtyard gas fireplace. It’s the easy way to expand your livable area and extend the outdoor season with cozy warmth in a nostalgic look.
